name: 2-Day Tour: Fes → Merzouga Desert Round Trip

seo.title: 2-Day Fes to Merzouga Tour — Sahara & Erg Chebbi Round Trip | Authentic Morocco Tours
seo.description: Private 2-day tour from Fes: Middle Atlas, Ifrane (Switzerland of Morocco), Azrou cedar forest, Ziz Valley, Erfoud, Erg Chebbi dunes in Merzouga. Night in desert camp.

hero.tagline: Fes → Middle Atlas → Erg Chebbi → back to Fes

intro: This 2-day tour takes you from Fes to the Merzouga desert through the Middle Atlas: the town of Ifrane, nicknamed the 'Switzerland of Morocco', the Azrou cedar forest with its Barbary macaques, then the spectacular Ziz Valley. The Fes–Merzouga journey takes about 7-8 hours. Night under the Sahara stars, camel ride at sunset and sunrise.
